results.title: LSU signee Lucas Nawrocki has made a decision regarding his future with the program
results.description: LSU high school signee and left-handed pitcher Lucas Nawrocki has taken his name out of the 2026 MLB Draft and is coming to school, he announced on social media Friday.

results.title: Central DeWitt baseball falls to Mount Vernon in postseason play
results.description: Central DeWitt (20-15) fell to Mount Vernon 3-0 in the IHSAA Class 3A Substate 4.

results.title: Grant, Guischard-Yearwood strike NACAC gold
results.description: Lalenii Grant and Mekhi Guischard-Yearwood struck gold for Trinidad and Tobago on the opening day of the North American, Central American and Caribbean (NACAC) Under-18 and Under-23 Championships in Tlaxcala, Mexico, yesterday.

results.title: 💪 We're not afraid: Lamine's warning to France
results.description: The semi-final between Spain and France is starting to heat up, and Lamine came out swinging with his statements. The Spanish gem made it clear that La Roja respects the strength of its rival, but t...

results.title: ‘I Don’t Care What Nobody Say’ — NBA Icon Tracy McGrady Predicts 76ers Will Reach the Finals, Under 1 Condition
results.description: In his heyday, Tracy McGrady was one of the most exciting players to watch in the NBA, much like the Philadelphia 76ers could be in 2026. As for McGrady, the high-flying swingman developed from a raw, athletic wing into a refined talent who went on to lead the NBA in scoring twice.

results.title: White Sox rookie Tristan Peters hits for the cycle, first for franchise in nearly 9 years
results.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Rookie Chicago White Sox center fielder Tristan Peters hit for the cycle Friday night, becoming the franchise’s first player to achieve the feat in nearly nine years. Peters doubled in the third, singled in the fifth and hit a two-run homer in the seventh against the Athletics. results.title: Langford and Burger homer in a four-run eighth as the Rangers beat the Astros 7-3
results.description: Wyatt Langford and Jake Burger homered in a four-run eighth inning as the Texas Rangers beat the Houston Astros 7-3 on Friday night. Langford’s leadoff homer and Burger’s three-run shot came off Bryan King (2-2) after the Astros had rallied...
